channel.title: What Is Being Built — Daily Activity Feed
channel.description: Daily updates on open-source automated research tools: commits, releases, and community activity.

item.title: Daily digest — 2026-06-28
item.description:
Our open-source research community has seen exciting updates across multiple projects. The `giladfeldman/escicheck` repository has been synchronized with the `escicheckapp` repository, bringing the `main` branch up to date with the latest version of `effectcheck` (v0.6.6). Meanwhile, the `shaheedazaad/auto-zcurve` project has improved its validation note with a newly added citation, enhancing the project's credibility and transparency. Additionally, the `giovannacdelsordo/output-it-forward` project has made it easier for users to access the Output-it-Forward extension by adding a direct link to the Chrome Webstore. These updates demonstrate the community's commitment to collaboration, validation, and user experience, and we celebrate the progress being made across these interconnected projects. As our community continues to grow and evolve, we look forward to seeing the impact of these updates and the innovative work being done across our research tools.

29 commits across 4 active repositories this week.

Dormant repos revived: escicheck, auto-zcurve

Most active:

metacheck10 commits
docpluck10 commits
regcheck7 commits
escicheck2 commits

item.title: escicheck: activity update
item.description:
giladfeldman/escicheck

The `main` branch was updated with a commit that synchronized it with the `escicheckapp` repository at commit `f37b5a1`, which corresponds to `effectcheck` version `0.6.6`, as stated in the commit message "sync from escicheckapp@f37b5a1 (effectcheck v0.6.6)". This commit was associated with issue `#20`. No other branches were worked on in this set of commits. The commit brought the `main` branch in line with the specified version of `effectcheck`. The synchronization commit updated the `main` branch to match the `escicheckapp` repository at the specified commit hash.

⚠ This repository was dormant and has recently become active again.

View all commits →

item.title: auto-zcurve: activity update
item.description:
shaheedazaad/auto-zcurve

The `main` branch was worked on, where the validation note was revised and a citation was included, as stated in the commit message "Revise validation note and include citation". No other branches were modified in this set of commits. The revision of the validation note and addition of a citation are the specific changes made in this commit. The commit message does not mention any other changes or additions to the repository. There are no other commits to report on, as only one commit is provided. The work was limited to the `main` branch, with no other branches being updated.

⚠ This repository was dormant and has recently become active again.

View all commits →
